command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "sudo kill 909818; sudo systemctl stop gitea; sudo systemctl disable gitea; sudo rm /etc/systemd/system/gitea.service /etc/gitea/app.ini 2>/dev/null; sudo systemctl daemon-reload; sleep 2; ps aux | grep gitea | grep -v grep"
